scrapedName: Hoi An Therapeutic Escape - Acupressure & Herbal Therapy 5 days

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hoi An - Welcome Dinner
itinerary.description: Upon arrival in Vietnam, you will be warmly greeted by our guide and transferred to your hotel. Take this time to relax and settle in, allowing yourself to adjust to the new surroundings. In the evening, you enjoy a special welcome dinner at a renowned local restaurant. Here, you will enjoy a carefully curated menu featuring nutritious Vietnamese cuisine crafted with medicinal herbs known for their healing properties. This is the perfect opportunity to taste traditional flavors while learning about the deep connection between food and wellness in Vietnamese culture.

itinerary.title: Experience Traditional Healing Arts of Vietnam Full Day
itinerary.description:
Start your day with a comprehensive health examination and consultation. These highly qualified professionals will assess your condition and recommend personalized treatments, combining ancient healing techniques with modern medical knowledge. After your treatment, enjoy a nourishing health-focused meal, carefully crafted using herbal ingredients and medicinal foods to support overall well-being. Medical Quality with Prestigious Team of Experts (100% of the team of Therapists are qualified Traditional Medicine Doctors with full knowledge of Traditional Medicine combined with Modern Medicine)

...

itinerary.title: Hoi An Half Day City Tour & Cooking Class
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your tour at Hoi An Market, where locals buy fresh ingredients, seafood, and daily essentials. It’s an ideal spot to observe everyday life and the local food culture in action. Then head to the Fujian Assembly Hall, a functioning community hall where residents perform rituals and make offerings, showing how traditional practices are preserved. Visit Phung Hung Ancient House and Tan Ky Ancient House, two heritage homes that reflect the living and working spaces of merchant families. The preserved interiors and courtyards provide a practical view of life during Hoi An’s trading he...

itinerary.title: Cham Island Handicraft Tour Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, you will embark on an amazing Cham Island adventure. Around 08:00 - 09:00, our driver will pick you up from your hotel in Hoi An and transfer you to Cua Dai Pier. At 09:00 - 10:00, enjoy a thrilling speedboat ride to Cham Island, arriving at Bai Lang to explore its rich cultural heritage. At Bai Lang, you will:

Visit a traditional handicraft village where locals weave hammocks using cooper-beech trees - a craft recognized as a UNESCO intangible cultural heritage in 2024. Learn how fishermen weave their fishing nets and tackle, an essential part of their daily lives

itinerary.title: Hoi An Departure
itinerary.description: Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time to relax or see the surroundings. At the designated time, our driver will take you to the airport for your flight home. When leaving Vietnam, take with you not just memories of breathtaking landscapes and cultural discoveries but also valuable insights into traditional healing practices that are helpful for well-being. We hope this journey has been enlightening and rejuvenating, and we look forward to welcoming you to another trip in the future.

highlights: Experience traditional Vietnamese healing arts with a full-day therapy package
Benefit from expert consultations with qualified traditional medicine doctors
Join premium healthcare packages with luxury treatments lasting up to 180 minutes
Discover Hoi An Ancient Town with a walking tour and hands-on Vietnamese cooking class
Experience Cham Island’s cultural heritage, vibrant coral reefs, and a fresh seafood beachside BBQ
included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
Meals as indicated in the program
Pre-examination with standard package ( You can upgrade to a higher package in the optional section )
